# Module 5 Coffee Discussion 

---
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

### Exercise 1: Heights

Fill the right column. 

```{python}
import numpy as np

x = np.round(np.random.normal(59,5,(12,)), decimals = 2)
print("Heights (12) = ",x)

print('x_bar = ',np.mean(x))
print('s = ',np.std(x,ddof = 1))
```


|Appropriate Distribution |  |
| --- | --- | 
| Parameters $\theta$ | | 
| Estimates of parameters $\hat{\theta}$ | |
| Standard Errors $\sigma_{\hat{\theta}}$| |   
|Confidence Intervals | | 


### Exercise 2: Inspection (Defective-1, Not Defective-0)

Fill the right column. 

```{python}
import numpy as np

x = np.random.binomial(1,0.3,(9,))
print("Inspected items (9) = ",x)

print('x_bar = ',np.mean(x))
print('s = ',np.std(x,ddof = 1))
```


|Appropriate Distribution |  |
| --- | --- | 
| Parameters $\theta$ | | 
| Estimates of parameters $\hat{\theta}$ | |
| Standard Errors $\sigma_{\hat{\theta}}$| |   
|Confidence Intervals | | 



### Exercise 3: Car Arrivals Over a Semester

Fill the right column. 

```{python}
import numpy as np

x = np.random.poisson(300,(120,))
print("Arrivals each Day (120) = ",x)

print('x_bar = ',np.mean(x))
print('s = ',np.std(x,ddof = 1))
```


|Appropriate Distribution |  |
| --- | --- | 
| Parameters $\theta$ | | 
| Estimates of parameters $\hat{\theta}$ | |
| Standard Errors $\sigma_{\hat{\theta}}$| |   
|Confidence Intervals | |
